name: Sunset Pier
tagline: Live Music, Waterfront Views & Key West Sunsets
address: 0 Duval St (Ocean Key Resort), Key West, FL 33040
welcome_message: I'm your Sunset Pier assistant. Ask me about our waterfront dining, live music, drinks, the best table for the sunset, or what to order.

reviews.text: Their burgers are absolutely amazing — we ordered them on Wednesday, Friday and Sunday during boat race week! Would love to have the sunset pier sauce recipe. The waterfront views of the boats and harbor are unbeatable. Seating all the way down the pier means everyone gets a great spot.
reviews.ai_response: Three burger orders in one week during boat race week — you are officially our biggest fan! The sunset pier sauce is a closely guarded secret but we love that it keeps guests coming back. Pier seating with harbor views for everyone is exactly the experience we work hard to deliver. Thank you for the wonderful review and we'll have those burgers ready next race week!

reviews.text: Came back specifically hoping for Natalia as our server. She was there and she was just as wonderful — drinks always full, attentive without being intrusive, genuinely warm. The key lime colada and Mahi Tacos were excellent. Perfect waterfront dinner.
reviews.ai_response: Returning specifically for Natalia — she is going to love reading this! That's the mark of a truly exceptional server and we're so fortunate to have her. The key lime colada and Mahi Tacos is a winning combination and we're glad everything delivered. Thank you for coming back and we hope the next visit brings you both back together again!

reviews.text: Blackened mahi-mahi sandwich and frozen margarita — both excellent. Husband had Mexican street corn and chicken salad and enjoyed everything. The Three Amigos band were so much fun. This is a great spot right on the water for casual dinner with live music and a beautiful sunset.
reviews.ai_response: The Three Amigos always bring the energy and it sounds like they delivered that night! The blackened mahi sandwich and margarita is one of our best combinations and the Mexican street corn has its own fan club. Casual waterfront dinner with live music and a Key West sunset — that's exactly what Sunset Pier is for. Thank you and we hope to see you back!

reviews.text: Amazing dinner at Sunset Pier. The key lime colada was delicious and so were the Mahi Mahi tacos. Our server Lindsay was great — amazing service. Would recommend and would definitely come back!
reviews.ai_response: Lindsay is one of our best and we're so glad she made the evening exceptional! The key lime colada and Mahi Tacos is a combination we're very proud of. Thank you for the kind words and we'll make sure Lindsay sees this review. Come back anytime — she and those tacos will be here!

reviews.text: The views and location are absolutely unmatched — best seat in Key West for the sunset. But the food pricing doesn't match the quality. The lobster roll at $38 had very little lobster. Drinks were good. Come for the views and cocktails, be selective with the food.
reviews.ai_response: The views and cocktails earning praise alongside an honest food concern — thank you for both. $38 for a lobster roll should mean loaded with lobster and we understand the disappointment when it doesn't deliver. We're reviewing this dish because you're not alone in this feedback. We want every part of the Sunset Pier experience to match those views. Please give us another chance on the food.

tripadvisor.name: TripAdvisor
tripadvisor.ranking: Waterfront Dining — Adjacent to Mallory Square

reviews.text: Beautiful scenery and weather. What made Sunset Pier stand out was our waitress Natalia. She saw to it that our drinks were always full and that we had everything we needed at all times. The personality of Natalia is that of a lovely lady who takes great care of her customers. My fiance and I have never felt compelled to leave remarks — Natalia was the difference maker. We look forward to going back in hopes she is our waitress.
reviews.ai_response: Natalia made such an impression that you felt compelled to leave your first ever review — that's the highest compliment a server can receive! She takes genuine pride in every guest at her tables and we're incredibly lucky to have her. We'll make sure she sees this. We hope to have both of you back — and we'll do our best to make sure Natalia is there to take care of you again!

reviews.text: Their burgers are absolutely amazing! We were there for the boat races and ordered a burger on Wednesday, Friday AND Sunday — we couldn't stop! Would love to have the sunset pier sauce recipe if anyone knows what it is! The waterfront view during the races was incredible.
reviews.ai_response: A burger order three times in one week — that is the ultimate endorsement! The sunset pier sauce is one of our best-kept secrets and we love that it keeps you coming back. The boat race views from the pier are something special. Thank you for this wonderful review and we'll have those burgers ready for your next visit!

reviews.text: This is a great spot right on the water for casual dinner, fruity cocktails, live music, and a beautiful sunset. I had the blackened mahi-mahi sandwich and a frozen margarita — both excellent. My husband ordered the Mexican street corn and chicken salad and enjoyed his too. The band performing was the Three Amigos and they were so much fun to watch. Seating extends all the way down the pier so no problem getting a table.
reviews.ai_response: The Three Amigos are one of our favorite acts and it sounds like they brought the energy that night! The blackened mahi-mahi sandwich and frozen margarita is a great combination and we're glad the Mexican street corn landed too. Seating all the way down the pier means everyone gets a view — exactly how it should be. Thank you for the wonderful review and we hope to see you back for the next Three Amigos show!

reviews.text: Had the most amazing dinner at Sunset Pier! The key lime colada was delicious and so were the Mahi Mahi tacos! Would recommend and would come back! Our server Lindsay was great — amazing service all night!
reviews.ai_response: Lindsay takes pride in every guest and it sounds like she delivered! The key lime colada and Mahi Mahi tacos is one of our favorite combinations — we're glad you discovered it. Thank you for the kind words and we'll make sure Lindsay sees this. Come back anytime — the colada and the tacos will be waiting!

reviews.text: This may be a resort area but the prices they wanted for the food were outrageous. The lobster roll for $38 had hardly any lobster that I could taste. The views are breathtaking and the location is unmatched but the food pricing doesn't match the quality. Drinks were good.
reviews.ai_response: Thank you for the honest feedback — $38 for a lobster roll that doesn't deliver on lobster is not acceptable and we hear you. Our kitchen team is reviewing this dish specifically because it's not the first time we've heard this concern. The views and location are things we're proud of and the food needs to match. We'd love the chance to make this right on a return visit — please come back and let us know so we can take care of you.

reviews.text: Ordered Grilled Mahi Mahi Tacos and a key lime colada. Both were excellent! Service was great, views were amazing. Fun live music made the whole vibe perfect. One of the best spots in Key West for a casual waterfront dinner.
reviews.ai_response: Grilled Mahi Tacos, a key lime colada, waterfront views, and live music — you put together the perfect Sunset Pier evening! Thank you for the kind words and we hope to have you back for round two. The colada and tacos will be waiting!

reviews.text: Perfect happy hour spot before the Mallory Square sunset celebration. Cocktails well-made and not outrageously priced for Key West. Views of the harbor were stunning. Staff attentive and friendly. The blackened mahi sandwich was fresh and excellent. Came back the next two nights.
reviews.ai_response: Back two more nights — that's the Sunset Pier effect! Pre-Mallory Square happy hour with harbor views and a blackened mahi sandwich is a Key West evening sequence we're proud of. Thank you for the kind words and we'll have your spot at the pier ready for the next visit!

reviews.text: Beautiful location and views — can't argue with that. But food is resort-priced and quality doesn't match. Lobster roll had minimal lobster for $38. Drinks were good. Come for the views and cocktails, be careful with the food menu.
reviews.ai_response: Fair and honest — thank you. The views are something we're genuinely proud of and the cocktails consistently earn good feedback. The lobster roll pricing and portion is an issue we're actively addressing because it's not the first time we've heard this. We want the food to match the setting. Come back and try the Mahi Tacos — those are consistently our best received dish.

reviews.text: Made Sunset Pier our nightly ritual during our vacation. Different live acts each night, always great service, views that never get old. The burgers are legitimately outstanding — ordered them three nights in a row. That sunset pier sauce is worth coming back for alone.
reviews.ai_response: Nightly ritual with three consecutive burger orders — you are officially part of the Sunset Pier family! The burgers and that sauce have their own fan club and we're glad you joined it. Thank you for making us your Key West anchor and we'll have the whole experience waiting for your next visit!

reviews.text: Great waterfront location with excellent views. Gets very busy around actual sunset time which means slower service. Worth it for the view — just plan to arrive early for the best seats down the pier. Drinks were good and the blackened mahi was solid.
reviews.ai_response: Arrive early for the best pier seats — that's the insider tip and you've shared it with future guests perfectly. We're always working on handling the sunset rush better and we appreciate the honest feedback on service pace. Glad the blackened mahi and drinks delivered. Thank you and come early next time — the best seats are absolutely worth it!

system_prompt:
You are the friendly assistant for Sunset Pier at Ocean Key Resort in Key West — a waterfront bar and restaurant at the very end of Duval Street, right on the Gulf of Mexico. Known for spectacular sunsets, live music, lobster rolls, and mahi tacos.

You speak with laid-back Key West warmth and genuine pride in the views and the vibe.

--- ABOUT ---
Sunset Pier sits at the tip of Duval Street, directly on the water at Ocean Key Resort. One of the best spots on the island to watch the world-famous Key West sunset. Live music on stage most days.

--- HOURS ---
Daily: 11:30 AM – 8:30 PM

--- MENU HIGHLIGHTS ---
- Lobster Rolls (excellent)
- Grilled Mahi Mahi Tacos
- Key Lime Pie (cheesecake-style, fabulous)
- Tropical cocktails and Pena coladas
- Full tiki bar

--- SEATING ---
Most tables on the boardwalk with water views. Arrive early for the best sunset seats — no reservations for outdoor seating, first come first served.

--- LIVE MUSIC ---
Live music on stage regularly. Check oceankey.com for entertainment schedule.

--- LOCATION ---
0 Duval St (at Ocean Key Resort), Key West
Phone: (305) 809-8072

If unsure: 'Call us at (305) 809-8072 or visit oceankey.com for today's entertainment schedule and specials!'
